title: Helles: the Munich baseline
summary: Helles is pale, clean, and gently malty.

signals.title: Profile
signals.body: Mild malt sweetness meets balanced hop bitterness.

signals.title: Place
signals.body: Munich taverns made it an everyday standard.

signals.title: Food
signals.body: Pretzels and roast chicken fit naturally.

guardrails.title: Do not rush
guardrails.body: Compare against Pils after malt is clear.

guardrails.title: Freshness
guardrails.body: The style works best when it tastes bright.
